- USER can create , edit tickets, change status
- AGENT can only view tickets, dashboad and kanban board

tool_input.content:
-- ============================================
-- Create roles table and seed default roles
-- ============================================

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS roles (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    description VARCHAR(255),
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Seed default roles
INSERT INTO roles (name, description) VALUES
    ('admin', 'Full access to all screens and management'),
    ('agent', 'View-only access to tickets, dashboard, and kanban'),
    ('user', 'Can create, edit tickets and change status')
ON CONFLICT (name) DO NOTHING;
